entry.title: Is it Possible to Deserialize this JSON from API in ABAP
entry.content:
I'm calling an API that is returning JSON to ABAP that I'm having difficulty deserializing.  This is the format of the JSON that is returned by the API:

{
"outputs": {
},
"tables": [
{
  "columns": [
      "Column_1",
      "Column_2",
     "Column_3",
     "Column_4",
  ],
  "rowLimitExceeded": false,
  "rows": [
      [
        "Value_1a",
        "Value_2a",
        "Value_3a",
        "Value_4a",
      ],
      [
        "Value_1b",
        "Value_2b",
        "Value_3b",
        "Value_4b",
      ]
  ]
}
],
"transactionNo": "43"
}

I've created multiple versions of a deep structure in an attempt to match the JSON format, but I'm only getting the TransactionNo field to successfully deserialize.  I think it might be because this isn't all valid JSON (the values in the columns and rows sections aren't seperated by a colon character), but am hoping someone here can help me deserialize this using the /ui2/cl_json=>deserialize method.  If not I may have to build my own parser for this data manually.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Environments Unavailable in SAP BAS
entry.content:
If anyone else has the same problems, here is my solution. In summary, I had an incorrect API endpoint stored in BAS.

  1. Login to BTP Cockpit and navigate from Overview to Cloud Foundry Environment
  2. Get from there the API Endpoint, Org Name and Name of Space
  3. Navigate back to BTP and execute >CF: Login to Cloud Foundry
  4. Sign Out from wrong Cloud Foundry Endpoint
  5. Login to correct Cloud Foundry Endpoint as seen in Step 2
  6. Open Terminal in BAS and execute cf login
  7. Login with your user and password credentials 
  8. Execute in Terminal command cf target -o [YOUR_ORGNAME] -s [YOUR_DEVNAME] as seen in Step 2
  9. Connect to Data Source / Service is now possible

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 - Sales Order text line interface back to Deli...
entry.content:
Hi WGrey,

Unfortunately, we didn't understand the issue as you only attached the images.

Can you please explain it in details?

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: BTP UI5 App PDF File Handling
entry.content:
We are building our first BTP UI5 app.   It is meant to replicate our Sales Order entry system in ECC that normally we run in SAP GUI.  At the end of the process in SAP GUI - SAP creates a PDF file using a smart form and opens the file in acrobat reader so the user can review, and send the email by PDF.

However, in BTP - we have enabled the app to automatically save PDF automatically on the local network drive - but we can only get the PDF to open in the in-browser PDF reader which doesn't have the option to email.  There doesn't seem to be a way to open it directly in Acrobat Reader from a web app. 

Any suggestions how to make this work?

entry.title: Re: Is it Possible to Deserialize this JSON from API in ABAP
entry.content: It's not valid because the columns and values have a comma after the last value.  Why would the parser handle invalid JSON?

entry.title: Re: VL10G in ECC showing Line item but in S4 Hana sales o...
entry.content: Did you compare the config for ECC and S4 --that you have Profile and Scenario ?-- are using the same config settings on these two ?

entry.title: Re: BTP UI5 App PDF File Handling
entry.content: I think the PDF send functionality should be solved via server side output management in the ECC backend. Isn't the E-Mail Address of the customer maintained in the master data?

entry.title: Issue with Lifecycle Field in Compliance Requirements Status for Permits after Migration
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am encountering an issue after migrating compliance requirements for permits in our SAP system. After the migration, I noticed that a new field, "Lifecycle", has been introduced. However, we are facing the following problem:

  • The "Lifecycle" field is automatically set to "In Preparation", even for permits that are already in a "Released" status.
  • This prevents us from changing the status of the permits, as the field appears locked, making it impossible to update the permit status as needed.

Steps to replicate the issue:

  1. Migrate compliance requirements related to permits.
  2. Check the "Lifecycle" field for the migrated permits.
  3. Notice that for permits that were previously released, the field shows "In Preparation" and the status cannot be modified.

Environment details:

  • SAP Module:  SAP EHS

entry.title: Re: SAP IAS BP
entry.content: Interresting quesiton. In the meantime I tend towards using the Test IAS only in a Sanbox Environment together with a IPS that only gets a limited number of users from Entra ID. That way you can test new configuration needs without negative impact to Production. As a Dev environment is for Developers like Production I would use also the Production IAS to provide them access.

entry.title: How to Perform Mass Upload of Sampling Data in SAP EHS?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently working with SAP EHS and need to upload sampling data (measurement results, analysis, etc.) in bulk into the system. So far, I’ve been entering this data manually using the standard transactions, but this process is becoming very time-consuming due to the large volume of data.

I would like to know if anyone has implemented a mass upload process for this type of data in EHS, and what best practices are recommended to achieve this. Here are a few specific questions I have:

  1. What tools do you recommend for mass uploads in EHS? Is it possible to use LSMW or any other standard SAP tool?
  2. Is there a way to integrate sampling results from a file (e.g., Excel) in an automated manner?
  3. How do you handle data validation and quality control requirements during a mass upload to ensure that the uploaded results are accurate?
  4. Is any custom program development required for this, or are there any standard solutions available?

Any insights or experiences you can share would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: EC Address field to Onboarding Form mapping Issue
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to map address field from Location Foundation Object to ONB Forms.

Address field is maintained in Location Foundation Object. Attached screenshots for your reference.

Kindly let me know how to map the address field to ONB forms.

 

 

 

SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding

entry.title: Re: A few updates from SAP Business One Support
entry.content:
Hi @JesperB1 

The session on SAP HANA Admin in Spanish was very valuable.

I really appreciate that there is content in Spanish, we have a lot of talent that does not connect emotionally when the spoken language is English.

If I could suggest a topic to address and go into more depth, it would be about licensing, proper use of licenses.

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: Failed to generate the backend operation proxy for RFC
entry.content: What ABAP release do you work on?

entry.title: Re: Is it Possible to Deserialize this JSON from API in ABAP
entry.content:
That's what I was thinking, but I'm not a JSON expert, so I was wondering if this actually was valid JSON.  When I put the JSON returned by the API in Notepad++ and use the JSON formatter, it formats it without any errors, thus why I was thinking that this might be valid JSON.  However, in Notepad++ if I try to generate a schema from the JSON it returns an error.  VS. when I put in valid JSON it creates an XSD for me without error.

Guess I get to manually parse the data returned from the API.

entry.title: Re: Is it Possible to Deserialize this JSON from API in ABAP
entry.content:
You're right, it's "invalid" JSON, but it's not the colon, it's the commas before "]". It's something which may not be well supported by API, possibly by /ui2/cl_json.

So first fix it and try again.

entry.title: Re: Parallel Processing with SUBMIT program
entry.content:
If you have 100.000 contracts, run 10 jobs of 10.000 contracts each.

What is your exact question please?

entry.title: Missing App Create Warehouse Tasks in Fiori Search - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Even if the business catalog SAP_SCM_BC_EWM_OUTB_PC is assigned to the user, it's not possible to find the Create Warehouse Tasks Application in the Fiori Search.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Missing App Create Warehouse Tasks in Fiori Search -...
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

This is an intended behavior. The app is designed to not have its own tile. Instead, you can access it exclusively through the Manage Outbound Delivery Orders app.

 

Best regards,

Geovana

entry.title: Re: Failed to generate the backend operation proxy for RFC
Re: Failed to generate the backend operation proxy for RFC
entry.content: SAP_BASIS 758 SAP_ABA 75I also a note when I deleted the mapping of the function that shows in the error the odata is generated but after adding the mapping it showed the same error

entry.title: COD2408 Hide edit option or configure all the fields as only reading in a sales order
entry.content:
Hello experts, hope you are doing well.

My client asked for a certain configuration in the sales order. My client needs that certain users are not able to edit the sales orders after they transfer the order to the ERP (It means that at the beginning these users need to create and edit the sales order, but once they simulate and then transfer the order to the ERP they may not be able to edit the order in C4C)

I have already looked for ways to do this via the roles, or by adaptation, by workflow rule or even trying to hide the edit option in the sales order. But unfortunately, I haven´t found a way to accomplish this. Is there any option that the system give us to massively configure many fields at the same time as only reading after the sales order is transferred, or maybe any other alternative?

I would really appreciate your help, thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: COD2408 Hide edit option or configure all the fields...
entry.content:
Hello!

To explore the possibilities of using roles, you can refer to the link provided below:

https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-cloud-for-customer/sap-cloud-for-customer-extension-guide/create-and-assign-rules?q=UI%20rule

If you are unable to find the answer in this document, you can visit the SAP Community to find relevant topics that can assist you with the procedure.

Rodrigo Arispe

SAP Product Support, CX C4C

SAP Labs Latin America

M: +14844225458

entry.title: Re: Failed to generate the backend operation proxy for RFC
entry.content: With this release you should try to use CDS and RAP instead of the very dated approach. Or does the backend have a different release?

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SAP CPI
entry.content: That worked and my iflow works now - I cannot thank you enough @Ryan. God bless you.

entry.title: Re: Failed to generate the backend operation proxy for RFC
entry.content: Unfortunately the isn't my call on that case it's a project of the company I am working with so changing the approach isn't something doable any time soon

entry.title: Copying Multiple Images
entry.content: I'm using Crystal Reports for Visual Studio 2019 and I noticed when I select more than one image/ole object, I can't copy them, only one at a time. Is there a way to copy multiple images at once?

entry.title: Re: BTP UI5 App PDF File Handling
entry.content: No - currently we don't store the email address in ECC. In SAP GUI - the PDF automatically opens up in Acrobat Reader - then the users can click the email button. This allows them to add additional documents and customize the contents of the email they are sending to the customer. We want to replicate that same experience in our BTP app

entry.title: Approval of purchase requisition failed. Contact admin. Message no. MMPUR_PR_WFL_COMMON008
entry.content:
Hello everyone 


I have an issue while trying to convert PR to PO , PR has been released but the staus of the document still 03 in release and when i checked workflow status app  for overall release of purchase requisition i found 3 errors

1- 

Approval of purchase requisition failed. Contact admin.

Message no. MMPUR_PR_WFL_COMMON008
2- 

Authorization missing for <POrg> ; contact administrator

Message no. MMPUR_REQ_COMMON097
3- 

An exception was raised

Message no. SY530

but i checked another PR with the same criteria but it has a staus released completed and already converted to po without any problem
can anyone explain how to solve this issue 
thanks

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

I'm Ahmed. I work as a geologist and I wish to become an SAP consultant.

I have completed a learning journey and I would be extremely grateful if you could provide me with an opportunity to take the certification exam.

Thank you once again for your ongoing support. I look forward to your favorable response.

entry.title: Re: Failed to generate the backend operation proxy for RFC
entry.content:
you don't have to stick to mapping.

just write code to call the function in the method of dpc_ext

entry.title: Re: Create Table of Contents Disclosure Management
entry.content: Hi @Eyal_Feiler , you can use standard Word TOC reference to create table of contents automatically. You can do it by styles (in this case you'll need refresh TOC link every time report is created), or by outline level (the TOC will be built automatically upon first report opening).

entry.title: Re: Sap Build Work Zone Standard Edition 3 times login ne...
entry.content:
I guess this note would help for checking the required steps

3407135 - Logon Screen Appears When Accessing an Application on Work Zone

entry.title: Re: BTP UI5 App PDF File Handling
entry.content: If you just want to avoid that the PDF is displayed inline in the browser and directly downloaded then you should check if the backend sets the Content-Disposition Header. Remove it and the PDF should be downloaded. Then the Previous steps can be kept. But as a Auditor I would have my doubs about this outside the system communication.

entry.title: Re: MICR Line in Check Form - E13B Format
entry.content: We are experiencing the same issue. Could you please elaborate on "make sure you check is monochrome and not PDF". Is that a configuration on the printer level? Thank you very much

entry.title: Re: BTP UI5 App PDF File Handling
entry.content:
The download part we have figured out already - it is already saving the file to a local network drive in a unique folder.

However - we want the PDF that just got saved to that local network drive to automatically open up in adobe acrobat (like it doesn in SAP GUI) so that the users can:

a) review the PDF to ensure it is accurate
b) click the button in acrobat reader to attach it to an email

entry.title: Create an offline mobile app using successfactors odata api
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm trying to an offline mobile application using SAP SuccessFactors OData API and I've been facing some problems to retrieve the data.

I've done all the configuration settings inside mobile cockpit, I can get the metadata from MBT URL generated by Mobile Connectivity configuration, I also can retrieve the data. But when I open the app, I can't see the data there, just an empty table.

I've tried to use offline data store and http rest connection, didn't work.

I've been seeing some videos, but everyone uses the sample odata service provided by Mobile Sample OData ESPM feature. I've tried government's public odata and I can retrieve. There is something wrong I must have been doing.

I appreciate if someone could share any tutorial about how to create a Mobile Connectivity and use it in the SAP MDK.

entry.title: Data Action to swing account values
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I am new to data actions (script and visual) in SAC. I am tasked with a swing calculations. In simple terms, there are overdraft and cash accounts. The calculation needs to look at the overdraft accounts and check if the sum value in those accounts is positive, it needs to be moved to the cash accounts, and if its negative it stays in the overdraft accounts. Can I get some advice on how to begin this calc? The SAC model is a week model (goes down from Year>>>Quarter>>>Month>>>Week.

Example (YTD values that have been rounded to the nearest 1000
OD500 = 1000
OD600 = -42

The calculation needs to move the 1000 in OD500 and the -42 needs to stay in the OD600

 

Thank you in advance, experts.

entry.title: Using Data Actions to swing account values
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I am new to data actions (script and visual) in SAC. I am tasked with a swing calculations. In simple terms, there are overdraft and cash accounts. The calculation needs to look at the overdraft accounts and check if the sum value in those accounts is positive, it needs to be moved to the cash accounts, and if its negative it stays in the overdraft accounts. Can I get some advice on how to begin this calc? The SAC model is a week model (goes down from Year>>>Quarter>>>Month>>>Week.

Example (YTD values that have been rounded to the nearest 1000
OD500 = 1000
OD600 = -42

The calculation needs to move the 1000 in OD500  to account CASH500 and the -42 needs to stay in the OD600

 

Thank you in advance, experts.

entry.title: GR55 report in SAP CO between two different system landscape
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have a new requirement two develop the similar report in other SAP system landscape in production system by taking the reference of a GR55 report from other production system.

1. is there any way to copy the same report between two different system landscapes (not within the client both are different system) If yes can you please help me on this or If no then i need to develop the report manually.

2. I am developing the same report using sandbox system using Report painter tool by taking reference of 1SAP and edited the elements and rows fields as per ourrequirements.

After executing the developed sample one in GR55 ---Report group(developed by me as per requirements)

second screen: My client doesn't want this period field

I can hide this this field in selection screen by saving variant but after executing the report it is showing in header section like this below;

How to exclude that 'period' field in the report group in report header can any one please help me. i already rechecked but period field not selected while developing the report in Report Painter tool.

Kindly need experts suggestion on this.

Regards,

Govindu Uday

entry.title: Data Action to swing account values
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I am new to data actions (script and visual) in SAC. I am tasked with a swing calculations. In simple terms, there are overdraft and cash accounts. The calculation needs to look at the overdraft accounts and check if the sum value in those accounts is positive, it needs to be moved to the cash accounts, and if its negative it stays in the overdraft accounts. Can I get some advice on how to begin this calc? The SAC model is a week model (goes down from Year>>>Quarter>>>Month>>>Week.

Example (YTD values that have been rounded to the nearest 1000
OD500 = 1000
OD600 = -42

The calculation needs to move the 1000 in OD500 to account CASH500 and the -42 needs to stay in the OD600.

Thank you in advance, experts.

entry.title: Re: No Correction Due to Value Changes (Rebate)
entry.content:
I face the same issue but my invoice is not  selected by VBOF  . My invoice is already posted .

Maybe i have to update my invoice but i do not know how.

 

Please help

entry.title: How to modify a join in subquery in BOBJ 3.1?
entry.content:
I need to add a join to subquery named _Table79.

Could someone please advise on how to do it?

Thank you,

Eugene

entry.title: Re: Approval of purchase requisition failed. Contact admi...
entry.content: You may have to cancel the task on the PR workflow, then open the PR in change mode and save it to retrigger the workflow -- You can also check SAP KBA- 3402028 for the resolution.

entry.title: Re: Error During ChangeSet Offline Call
entry.content:
Hi Bill,

after some research I found some clues.

Premise:

  • The Service have the Entity Item. This Entity is Stream Enabled.
  • Before not working scenario, the Item Entity do not was Stream Enabled.

I tried to switch the service completely Online and the error changed in: 

"Error: Stream link for createMedia call in change set is missing inline data for entity type: Item"

In the ChangeSet call I do not have any createMedia request but I have sequentially this calls:

  • CreateEntity(Head)
  • CreateEntity(Texts)
  • CreateEntity(Item)

Based on Error message, why I need to set a createMedia call for Item Entity if I do not need to send a stream ?

The purpose of Stream in Item Entity is a separate functionality that manage an Excel file but, in the ChangeSet call I need only to send normal data to backend for Sales Order creation.

The problem seems linked to the Item creation.

This is the rule:

import ItemsHandler from "./ItemsHandler";
/**
 * Describe this function...
 * @Param {IClientAPI} clientAPI
 */
export default async function CreateSalesOrderItems(clientAPI) {
  //get page proxy
  let pageProxy = clientAPI.getPageProxy();
 
  //get items
  let items = ItemsHandler.getItems();
  for (var i = 0; i < items.length; i++){
    pageProxy.setActionBinding(items[i]);
    await clientAPI.executeAction("/somanagement/Actions/CreateSalesOrderActions/CreateSalesOrderItems.action");
  }
  return Promise.resolve();
}
 
and this is the Action:
 
{
    "_Type": "Action.Type.ODataService.CreateEntity",
    "ActionResult": {
        "_Name": "CreateSalesOrderItems"
    },
    "Target": {
        "Service": "/somanagement/Services/ServiceV2.service",
        "EntitySet": "ItemSet"
    },
    "Properties": {
        "Discount": "{Discount}",
        "OrderS": "{OrderS}",
        "Posnr": "{Posnr}",
        "Matnr": "{Matnr}",
        "EAN": "{EAN}",
        "CustMaterial": "{CustMaterial}",
        "ShipTo": "{ShipTo}",
        "Qty": "{Qty}",
        "UM": "{UM}",
        "DataCons": "{DataCons}",
        "Tester": "{Tester}",
        "Value": "{Value}",
        "Url": "{Url}",
        "Storage": "{Storage}",
        "TypePos": "{TypePos}",
        "Plant": "{Plant}",
        "DescriptionMat": "{DescriptionMat}"
    },
    "RequestOptions": {
        "RemoveCreatedEntityAfterUpload": true
    }
}

What am I missing ?

Thank you,

Angelo.

entry.title: SAP Lighthouse Program - Partner Use Cases adopting BTP GenAI Capabilities [Part 1]
entry.content:
SAP sits at the nexus between technology and business. Artificial intelligence (AI), and above all, generative AI, marks a paradigm shift on how computer systems learn from data, solve complex problems, and even provide creativity when it’s needed. SAP is committed to helping organizations through this transformative moment by creating business outcomes that were unimaginable before through SAP Business AI.

The SAP BTP Lighthouse Program, sponsored by the office of SAP CTO, offers partners and customers advanced access and hands-on support from our product teams for BTP services with embedded GenAI capabilities. For SAP, partners are a critical part of our plan to help the world run better and improve people's lives. The Lighthouse program partner track supports partners to deliver their GenAI use cases leveraging resources across SAP.

In part 1 of this 3-part series, I will highlight some of the amazing work that participating partners have created leveraging SAP Business AI services such as:

  • SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine enables businesses to combine the power of large language models (LLMs) with company-specific, real-time data and business process know-how, all integrated in one multi-model database: SAP HANA Cloud.
  • SAP Generative AI Hub incorporates generative AI into AI activities in SAP AI Core and SAP AI Launchpad.

 SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine and SAP Generative AI Hub are being used by our partners in multiple ways:

Deloitte uses them to build a Supply Chain Planning Assistant that aids planners in identifying root causes of issues, managing exceptions, and optimizing inventory for customers.

LeverX built an Unstructured Data Intelligent Assistant for customers like Enable Injections that uses natural language to search, navigate and analyze unstructured data stored in proprietary formats.

HCLTech has developed several GenAI solutions leveraging SAP Business AI, including:

  • Lifesciences Industry: The Patient Enrollment/Dropout Prediction solution streamlines ClinOps processes and maximizes the value of clinical trials.
  • Utilities Industry: The Rate Case Normalizer helps utility providers analyze documents and automate reporting and reviews, streamlining regulatory compliance processes.

You can find out more about these partners and SAP BTP GenAI services here. Looking for the next wave of adoption stories - there is exciting news coming up from the Lighthouse program partners and our product teams at SAP TechEd, Oct 8-9 2024, Register Today!

entry.title: Re: Message no. FINS_ACDOC_POST094 Perform foreign currency
entry.content: Muchas gracias por la colaboración!! ya había realizado ese proceso, pero el error persiste, ya que la valuación la está generando con un pago ya contabilizado y compensado. El error persiste.

entry.title: Payment Proposal F110 - SWBP Stop Event Raised
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have issue with Custom Workflow for Payment Proposal.

I have a Custom Table for Approval. The Approval mechanism is sequence process, i.e 4 step.

In every step can have 1 or more approval. 

step approval
1 ==> Approval A or B
2 ==> Approval A or C
3 ==> Approval D
4 ==> Approval E


when proposal created, user A and B will receive wf in their inbox.

we use zprogram to approve/reject the payment proposal through inbox (sbwp).

The issue come when user A or B open payment proposal through inbox/swbp (just open, no click approve), then the payment proposal disappear in another user inbox (sbwp) but it is still there for user A. This happened in every step which have more than one approval.
Does anyone here have the same experience? or any constructive suggestion to help me solve my issue.

Thanks in advance.

SAP Business Workflow

entry.title: 🇩🇪 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core and Python. You do not need to have any background in the topic, but a lot of curiosity!

In this CodeJam you will learn how to use Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core to implement a retrieval augmented generation (RAG) use case to improve the responses of large language models (LLMs) and reduce hallucinations. You will learn how to deploy an LLM on SAP AI Core and query it via SAP AI Launchpad and the Python SDK. Furthermore, you will learn about the most important genAI concepts and create and use text chunks and embeddings to improve your RAG response.

This is a free in-person event and is planned for Friday, October 11th in Munich, Germany 🇩🇪 from 09:00 to 15:00 CEST (GMT+01:00). The language of the event and the content will be in English. The instructor is a Developer Advocate Nora von Thenen.

The event is being hosted at 

Friedrich-Ludwig-Bauer-Straße 5, 85748 Garching bei München, Germany

Note that spaces are limited: we can only accommodate 30 attendees.

Visit the SAP CodeJam group for more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees.

entry.title: Cross-company stock transfer: Condition P101 in billing document twice
entry.content:
Dear gurus,

we do cross company stock transfer orders (STO). The process works just fine, but we came along one strange thing:

For billing, we defined a pricing procedure similar to standard ICAA01, but with just one (!) price condition, condition type P101. Price source was set to A (Purchase Order) to copy the condition value for P101 from the STO to the billing document.

Now, when we create a billing document, there are two (!) rows for condition type P101.

 

The first one is marked red (incorrect), it has a value of zero. Further values:
Condition class: B Prices
Calculat.Type: C Quantity
Condit.Category: H Basic price
Cond.Control: A Adjust for quantity variance
Condit.Origin: A Automatic Pricing
Inactive: X Inactive vie formulas or incorrect

 

The second P101 works just as planned, the condition value is copied from the STO and Price Source is A (Purchase order). Further values:
Condition class: B Prices
Calculat.Type: C Quantity
Condit.Category: G Internal price
Cond.Control: H Condition value fixed (cost price)
Condit.Origin: A Automatic Pricing

Now my questions: Why is the first row generated and why is it incorrect?

Any ideas?

Thanks
Jens

entry.title: Re: UNPACK Not working on ABAP on Cloud?
entry.content: Hi all, I´m having same issue on S4HC. Do you know if there is a workaround for it please?

entry.title: SAP Standard table /BIC/AGBWD000500 Is not displayin the data from jan to April 2024,
entry.content:
SAP Standard table /BIC/AGBWD000500 Is not displayin the data from jan to April 2024 and getting message as 'no table entries found'

I can see the data from may 2024 to current. I understood that's it's not showing data for 4 or 5 months back. Where I can see this threshold for this? I want to know the root cause. I tried to check from my end but I didn't get it. Could you please help me on this?

entry.title: Re: SEN. How to deactivate shortcut text in bubbles?
entry.content:
Hi,

You must modify the standard Recording Dictionary to change the standard text captured when recording Simulations.  There are some instructions on P. 51-54 of this document.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Action Box in Web-Dynpro app Process Maintenance Notification (W0003)
entry.content: Hello Ildar, hope you're doing well! Did you happen to find any solution for this? Thanks

entry.title: Re: Migration Cockpit （LTMC) 1 - Migrate Asset balance for fixed assets
entry.content:
Hi

Thanks for detailed explanation and it was great learning.

entry.title: How to make a CFL based field non-editable in SAP GUI transaction ?
entry.content:
I am trying to add a field to Business Context PS_PROJECT using Custom Fields App.

I am able to add the field and enable it on Project Definition tcodes ( CJ01/02/03 )

Having said that the field is editable by default. Now i have a required to make this field non-editable. Key point here is this field is on a SAP-GUI transaction and not out of the box Fiori app

How can this be achieved ?

entry.title: DISPATCHER GRAY
entry.content:
Hi, Experts!

well i'm really not sure about what happen with dispatcher

servidoraapp:YYYadm 1003> sapcontrol -nr 00 -function GetProcessList
04.09.2024 17:08:49
GetProcessList
OK
name, description, dispstatus, textstatus, starttime, elapsedtime, pid
disp+work, Dispatcher, GRAY, Stopped, , , 4244
igswd_mt, IGS Watchdog, GREEN, Running, 2024 09 04 14:41:27, 2:27:22, 4245

servidoraapp:YYYadm 1004> sapcontrol -nr 01 -function GetProcessList
04.09.2024 17:08:56
GetProcessList
OK
name, description, dispstatus, textstatus, starttime, elapsedtime, pid
msg_server, MessageServer, GREEN, Running, 2024 09 04 14:41:22, 2:27:34, 3980
enq_server, Enqueue Server 2, GREEN, Running, 2024 09 04 14:41:22, 2:27:34, 3981

already check: the ports its ok! the hostname on the OS and DB its ok! the license its ok! the firewall desactivate! the ping resolved on the OS and DB. shutdown applicative SAP to level OS and stop DB, and restart the box, review the resources of memory it's ok, the notes in sap: 3390633,2667891,3392400 it's ok.  and used the command df it's ok. but the problem persist. attached the log  dev_disp and dev_w0.

HDB version info:
version: 2.00.076.00.1705400033
branch: fa/hana2sp07
machine config: linuxx86_64

please help me to resolved this problem

Txs in advanced.

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
@comercial_cinfa we will post more concrete timelines in the coming weeks. Our recommendation is to migrate existing content as soon as possible as the Optimized Experience has been the platform where we have been delivering critical innovation such as Composites, Model Repointing, Present Mode, and more.

For new assets, it is recommend to directly create them within the Optimized Experience to avoid having to go through a one time migration.

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content: @VivekKumarVS we are in the process of building a Bulk Migration Tool which will help migrate multiple assets at the same time to the Optimized Experience. Within the Bulk Migration Tool we will filter down the list of assets to those that are in the Classic Experience.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I identify as a person in the below categories:

    • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
    • People looking to switch their careers mid-life

I come from Agra, India, a small city where we do not have economic opportunities as there are in urban locations. 

I am 37 years old and want to switch my career to SAP implementation projects. This is a completely new field for me to get into and this certification would be really helpful to kickstart my career in SAP ERP space. 

I have completed my learning journey for the Certificate program - 'SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition'.
 
Could I please receive my free certification exam attempt. Thank you,

 

Regards,

Gaurav Yadav

entry.title: Can't create destination service for a UI5 app for Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Full disclosure: Very experienced developer, but totally new to this product.

I am following the steps for Develop an App for SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition with Your Own Dev Tools.

I am on this page. When I perform the steps to deploy the application, I am getting the following error when it goes to create the destination service: Service broker error: Service broker destination-service-broker failed with: Service broker parameters are invalid: Destination name: contains invalid character.

What I believe is the relevant section of the mta.yaml file is as follows:

resources:
  - name: tutorial.myui5project-destination-service
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: destination
      service-name: tutorial.myui5project-destination-service
      service-plan: lite
      config:
        HTML5Runtime_enabled: true
        version: 0.0.1
        init_data:
          instance:
            existing_destinations_policy: update
            destinations:
              - Name: ""
                Authentication: NoAuthentication
                ProxyType: Internet
                Type: HTTP
                URL: https://services.odata.org
                HTML5.DynamicDestination: true
                HTML5.ForwardAuthToken: true
 
This was all generated automatically by following the tutorial steps. A lot of Googling and searching the SAP KB has led me nowhere.  Any ideas?
 
Al

entry.title: Cannot Cancel a Sales Order, Reason for Rejection is Disabled.
entry.content:
Hi there,

We cant cancel the sales order. The reason for rejection field on General tab and Items are disabled, not able to maintain a value to cancel the order. 

The sales order items are with type= Service - fixed price (project)

  • Delivery status=in process.
  • Invoice status=Finished.
  • Reason for rejection are all disabled/grayed out.

Thanks and best,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Cannot Cancel a Sales Order, Reason for Rejection is...
entry.content:
The reason for rejection is disabled on a sales order line when one of the following conditions met.

  • The delivery status is Finished. or
  • The invoice status is Finished.

If it is a delivery based item, you will need to cancel the following invoice and outbound deliveries to revoke the invoice and delivery status. 

If it is a project based item, you will need to revoke the invoicing status via Project Invoicing - Sales Order view - Change Status button. And revoke delivery status by changing the reference project task back from completed/closed status.

You can get more information from the KBA: 2644606 - How to maintain the Reason for Rejection in Project Based Sales Order Item (https://me.sap.com/notes/2644606)

In the case here, since the invoice status is finished, the cancellation is not allowed. You will have to revoke the invoice status back from finished.

Thanks,

Adie

entry.title: Restriction of supplier invoice number in VIM duplication check

entry.title: How to Automate "Set Ready for Shipping" status for Outbound Delivery?
entry.content: In Outbound Delivery, after confirmation of Warehouse Task, and before posting Goods Issue, we are updating "Set Ready for Shipping" status manually. How to make it automatic?

entry.title: CAP Multi-tenant Data Isolation without Tenants accounts
entry.content:
Background

Hi! My team is trying to create an CAP application for an existing service. We want to use the functionality of the Multi-tenant data isolation to create tenant specific containers in Hana DB. Moreover, we want to use a single XSUAA instance with single Bearer token to access said containers directly. However, we do not want to create Subaccounts or want to expose the CAP application to the users.

Desired Flow
Onboarding:

  1. Users subscribe to existing service

  2. Service triggers subscription to this CAP Application, where cap `tenantId` is set as a combination of user `tenantId` and `instanceId`

  3. Subscription creates HDI Containers linked to the cap `tenantId`

    Using POST http://endpoint/-/cds/deployment/subscribe

During normal runtime:

Some of the requests from users will be passed to the CAP application to be processed in their specific container and authentication is done using the same XSUAA internal bearer token from service

Steps Taken

  • Subscribing using custom `tenantId`

    • Outcome: Success - Containers are also created without any issues

    • Problem: Unable to access these containers as XSUAA is unable to authenticate

  • Using the same Bearer token generated by Provider Account to access tenant container

    • Outcome: Failure

    • Problem: Token used by service manager to get context for Provider account, resulting in all requests to be accessing the same container, the mtx information container

  • Creating Subaccount and subscribing to CAP app using created Subaccount `tenantId` only

    • Outcome: Success - Can access tenant specific container, authentication done using XSUAA shared `clientId` and `clientSecret` but using the Subaccount domain to generate bearer token

    • Problem: Not the desired flow

Can I check if CAP supports this use case? Any help would be appreciated in this matter! Thanks!

entry.title: Re: ODATA API ‘Attachments’ Service in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Prabha,

Thank you for a detailed blog.

We want to create a PO and add attachments using standard API's in S/4 Hana on Premise system. We have found below 2 API's

API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV

API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV

 

Our requirement to attach the documents at the time of PO creation. Kindly let me know is it possible to call these API's  in sequence or any other alternative approach is there.

entry.title: Re: Different Configuration in QA and production system in Employee Central
entry.content:
Hi Rakesh,

Couple of Questions ...

1. Have the customer/project Gone live? If yes, then do an instant Refresh from Prod to QA.

2. If Project has not gone live, then Import/Export Templates/Config from QA to Prod. 

Hope this answers in a short way..

Regards,
Projit

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano 

 

Myself Naidu, I am writing to express my interest in pursuing SAP certification, with a specific focus on Developing SAP UI5 Applications. As someone who identifies with key underrepresented groups, including individuals from remote or underserved locations, first-generation college students, and those seeking mid-life career transitions, I am committed to acquiring the skills and knowledge necessary to excel in SAP technology.

Having successfully completed the "Developing SAP UI5 Applications" learning journey, I have gained a solid understanding of SAP's Development processes and am now eager to deepen my expertise in SAP UI5 application development with certification. I am fully prepared to embrace the challenges of this certification and am excited about the opportunities it will unlock in my career.

Thank you for considering my commitment to professional growth and learning. I look forward to the opportunity to further develop my skills in SAP UI5 Applications and contribute meaningfully to the industry.

Sincerely,

Karri Naidu

+91 8247262816
